title: paeonia officinalis var. lusitanica
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. lusitanica, also known as the Portuguese peony or Lusitanica peony, is a variety of the common peony plant, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis var. lusitanica include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
